mapper.sql: id, word_text, phonetic, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentence, example_translation, audio_url, difficulty_level, frequency_rank, tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public_word ( word_text, phonetic, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentence, example_translation, audio_url, difficulty_level, frequency_rank, tags, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{wordText}, #{phonetic}, #{partOfSpeech}, #{definition}, #{exampleSentence}, #{exampleTranslation}, #{audioUrl}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{frequencyRank}, #{tags}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM public_word WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM public_word WHERE word_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY frequency_rank ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT FROM public_word WHERE tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tags}, '%') ORDER BY frequency_rank ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO public_word ( word_text, phonetic, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentence, example_translation, audio_url, difficulty_level, frequency_rank, tags, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.wordText}, #{item.phonetic}, #{item.partOfSpeech}, #{item.definition}, #{item.exampleSentence}, #{item.exampleTranslation}, #{item.audioUrl}, #{item.difficultyLevel}, #{item.frequencyRank}, #{item.tags}, NOW(), NOW() )
